'''âj-f-k''' ('''jafaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polyesterify|polyesterify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polyesterify|polyesterify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| jafaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafakithi|jafakithi]] || [[word:jafakiji|jafakiji]] || [[word:jafakishi|jafakishi]] || [[word:jafaki|jafaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafakuthuth|jafakuthuth]] || [[word:jafakujuj|jafakujuj]] || [[word:jafakushush|jafakushush]] || [[word:jafak|jafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafakuthu|jafakuthu]] || [[word:jafakuju|jafakuju]] || [[word:jafakushu|jafakushu]] || [[word:jafaku|jafaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafakufuth|jafakufuth]] || [[word:jafakufuj|jafakufuj]] || [[word:jafakufush|jafakufush]] || [[word:jafakuf|jafakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafakethe|jafakethe]] || [[word:jafakeje|jafakeje]] || [[word:jafakeshe|jafakeshe]] || [[word:jafake|jafake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafakothoth|jafakothoth]] || [[word:jafakojoj|jafakojoj]] || [[word:jafakoshosh|jafakoshosh]] || [[word:jafak|jafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafakotho|jafakotho]] || [[word:jafakojo|jafakojo]] || [[word:jafakosho|jafakosho]] || [[word:jafako|jafako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafakofoth|jafakofoth]] || [[word:jafakofoj|jafakofoj]] || [[word:jafakofosh|jafakofosh]] || [[word:jafakof|jafakof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafakĂŻfĂŻf|jafakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻfĂŻf|jafakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻfĂŻf|jafakĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻfĂŻf|jafakĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]] || [[word:jafakĂŻf|jafakĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jafakĂŠthĂŠ|jafakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jafakĂŠjĂŠ|jafakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jafakĂŠshĂŠ|jafakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jafakĂŠ|jafakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafakathath|jafakathath]] || [[word:jafakajaj|jafakajaj]] || [[word:jafakashash|jafakashash]] || [[word:jafak|jafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafakatha|jafakatha]] || [[word:jafakaja|jafakaja]] || [[word:jafakasha|jafakasha]] || [[word:jafaka|jafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafakafath|jafakafath]] || [[word:jafakafaj|jafakafaj]] || [[word:jafakafash|jafakafash]] || [[word:jafakaf|jafakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jafakasha|jafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojafakasha|gojafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijafakasha|gokijafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafaknĂŒsha|jafaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojafaknknĂŒsha|gojafaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijafaknĂŒsha|gokijafaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafakshĂ«sha|jafakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafaknkshĂ«sha|gojafaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafakshĂ«sha|gokijafakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafakrosha|jafakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaknkrosha|gojafaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafakrosha|gokijafakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jafakmusha|jafakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaknkmusha|gojafaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafakmusha|gokijafakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jafaksherasha|jafaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojafaknksherasha|gojafaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijafaksherasha|gokijafaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jafakngasha|jafakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojafaknkngasha|gojafaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijafakngasha|gokijafakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jafakyasha|jafakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojafaknkyasha|gojafaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijafakyasha|gokijafakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jafakyamasha|jafakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojafaknkyamasha|gojafaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijafakyamasha|gokijafakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafaknĂŒshĂ«sha|jafaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojafaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijafaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafaknĂŒrosha|jafaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaknknĂŒrosha|gojafaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafaknĂŒrosha|gokijafaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafaknĂŒmusha|jafaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaknknĂŒmusha|gojafaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafaknĂŒmusha|gokijafaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafakshĂ«nĂŒsha|jafakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojafaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijafakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafakshĂ«rosha|jafakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaknkshĂ«rosha|gojafaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafakshĂ«rosha|gokijafakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafakshĂ«musha|jafakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaknkshĂ«musha|gojafaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafakshĂ«musha|gokijafakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafakronĂŒsha|jafakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafaknkronĂŒsha|gojafaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafakronĂŒsha|gokijafakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafakroshĂ«sha|jafakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafaknkroshĂ«sha|gojafaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafakroshĂ«sha|gokijafakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafakromusha|jafakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafaknkromusha|gojafaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafakromusha|gokijafakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jafakmunĂŒsha|jafakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojafaknkmunĂŒsha|gojafaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijafakmunĂŒsha|gokijafakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jafakmushĂ«sha|jafakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojafaknkmushĂ«sha|gojafaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijafakmushĂ«sha|gokijafakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jafakmurosha|jafakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojafaknkmurosha|gojafaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijafakmurosha|gokijafakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jafak|jafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠfĂŠk|jĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojafak|hojafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠfĂŠk|hojĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojafak|hohojafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠfĂŠk|hohojĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjafak|nĂŒjafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŒjĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjafak|nĂŒnĂŒjafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjafak|nĂŻjafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŻjĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjafak|nĂŻnĂŻjafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujafak|lujafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠfĂŠk|lujĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujafak|lulujafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠfĂŠk|lulujĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijafak|lijafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠfĂŠk|lijĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijafak|lilijafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠfĂŠk|lilijĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojafak|kojafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠfĂŠk|kojĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojafak|kokojafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠfĂŠk|kokojĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejafak|kejafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠfĂŠk|kejĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejafak|kekejafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠfĂŠk|kekejĂŠfĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
